title: Refund policy catalog
description: Reference table for MembershipPlan.refund_policy enum. Each policy defines the customer-facing refund behaviour when a membership is cancelled. Displayed to the customer at signup + snapshotted on the membership at signing.

policies.description: Once payment is captured, no refund is issued regardless of cancellation timing. Soft-cancel ends at period-end; hard-cancel refused unless the buyer's remorse window (config-controlled) still applies.
policies.typical_use: Low-margin high-volume programmes; drop-in classes with tight capacity
policies.customer_disclosure_text_default: All membership payments are final. Cancelling will stop future renewals but no refund will be issued for the current period.

policies.description: Hard-cancel yields a refund proportional to remaining days in the current period. Requires the Enterprise `membership_hard_cancel_prorated_refund` entitlement.
policies.typical_use: Premium academies competing on customer-friendly policies
policies.customer_disclosure_text_default: You may cancel at any time. If you cancel mid-period, you'll receive a refund proportional to the unused portion of your current billing period.

policies.description: Full refund of the current period's payment IF cancelled within refund_grace_days of contract signing. After the grace window, refund_policy behaves as 'no_refund'. Consumer-protection-friendly.
policies.typical_use: Cooling-off compliance in EU / UK / CA jurisdictions where 14-day return-right applies
policies.customer_disclosure_text_default: You may cancel within :grace_days days of signing for a full refund. After that, cancellation will stop future renewals but no refund will be issued for the current period.

policies.description: No automatic refund on cancellation. Customer requests a refund; admin manually reviews and issues a credit memo via the refund module. Highest admin overhead, most flexible outcomes.
policies.typical_use: Case-by-case handling — small academies without a firm policy
policies.customer_disclosure_text_default: Refunds are handled case-by-case at the discretion of academy staff. Cancelling stops future renewals; contact us to request a refund review.

cross_reference: MembershipPlanObserver.creating validates refund_policy + refund_grace_days consistency via valid_refund_policy rule
CalculateProratedRefundOnHardCancel hook branches on refund_policy: prorated → compute unused days; full_within_grace + within grace → refund full; else no automated refund
SDUI signup screen surfaces the customer_disclosure_text_default from this catalog, substituting :grace_days for the plan's actual value
Snapshotted at signing on membership.metadata → refund_policy_at_signing preserves the policy against future plan-level policy changes
